content: ICAO/PANS-ATM (Doc 4444) readback rules: pilots must read back route clearances, runway-related instructions (takeoff/land/hold-short/cross/taxi), runway-in-use, altimeter settings, SSR/squawk codes, level (altitude) instructions, heading and speed instructions, and transition levels. Standard call structure is WHO YOU ARE CALLING + WHO YOU ARE + POSITION/LEVEL + WHAT YOU WANT. Conditional clearances must be read back in the exact format given; a correct readback is the mechanism that lets the controller confirm the pilot understood.
